description: This satellite image, acquired on 2011-10-04 by SPOT-5 at 2.5 m resolution, illustrates lines of forest along a river with a Strahler level 3, indicative of forest close to riparian zones. The image utilizes a 1/2/3 Band Combination. Visible features include a dark blue linear river, a light green linear band of trees and scrub following the river, and adjacent agricultural fields appearing in bright pink and dark red hues, characteristic of vegetation in false-color infrared imagery. The source is CNES 2011©, with distribution by Airbus DS/Spot Image.
